title: illigera novoguineensis
intro: Illigera novoguineensis is a plant species native to the tropical rainforests of New Guinea, belonging to the family Hernandiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Illigera novoguineensis include relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, with leaves, stems, and roots being used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
